---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use Case

Describe the problem or workflow this feature would improve.

## Affected Steps / Commands

Which parts of Sigma Protocol does this relate to?

- Steps: (e.g., Step 11 PRD Generation, Step 5 Wireframes)
- Commands: (e.g., `/implement-prd`, `/platform-sync`)
- Skills: (e.g., `deep-research`, `frontend-design`)

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this should work.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered and why they were not ideal.

## Platform Scope

Which platforms should this apply to?

- [ ] Claude Code (primary)
- [ ] Cursor
- [ ] Factory Droid
- [ ] All platforms

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples, or references that help explain the request.
